lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires immediate attention before today's events.
lead.deck: With a founder confidential and pitch practice already scheduled for this afternoon, handling this departure now prevents cascading complications across your team and upcoming commitments. Getting ahead of the transition matters more than the day's external meetings.
